title.ko: 밸브; 탭(Tap); 콕(Cock); 작동하는 플로트(float); 배기 또는 흡기장치
title.en: VALVES; TAPS; COCKS; ACTUATING-FLOATS; DEVICES FOR VENTING OR AERATING

definition.ko: 구조에 따른 타입 리프트밸브, 게이트밸브 또는 슬라이드밸브, 탭(TAP), 다이어프램 차단장치 F16K1/00 ～ 7/00 다방향 밸브(MULTIPLE-WAY VALVE) F16K11/00 차단장치의 그밖의 구조적 형태, 차단부품의 배치 F16K13/00 기능에 따른 타입 첵밸브; 안전밸브 또는 평형밸브; 유체를 혼합하기 위한 장치 F16K15/00; 17/00; 11/00 유체 분배밸브(DELIVERY VALVE); 노즐로부터 적하(DRIP)를 방지하기 위한 밸브 F16K21/00; 23/00 밀폐체의 배기 또는 흡기 F16K24/00 세부 또는 일반적 수단 수동 또는 제어 F16K29/00, F16K31/00, F16K39/00, F16K43/00 보조수단 F16K47/00, F16K49/00 안전 F16K35/00, F16K37/00 세부; 밸브부재와 밸브시트 사이의 접촉, 하우징(HOUSING), 플로트(FLOAT), 밀봉(SEAL) F16K25/00, F16K27/00, F16K33/00, F16K41/00 그밖의 세부 F16K51/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 F16K99/00

title.ko: 리프트 밸브, 즉 적어도 1개의 구성요소가 폐쇄면에 수직인 개폐동작을 하는 폐쇄부재(closure member)를 갖는 차단장치(cut-off apparatus)(다이어프램 밸브 F16K 7/00 )
title.en: Constructional types

title.ko: 리프트 밸브, 즉 적어도 1개의 구성요소가 폐쇄면에 수직인 개폐동작을 하는 폐쇄부재(closure member)를 갖는 차단장치(cut-off apparatus)(다이어프램 밸브 F16K 7/00 )

in which the spindle is inclined to the general direction of flow
with streamlined valve member around which the fluid flows when the valve is opened

title.en: Mechanical actuating means
for remote operation

title.ko: 기계식 동조장치(timing device)에 의하여 작동되는 것, 예. 대시폿(dash pot)을 갖는 것(자동폐쇄밸브 F16K 21/16)
title.en: actuated by mechanical timing-device, e.g. with dash-pot (self-closing valves F16K0021160000)
with screw-spindle
with crank, eccentric, or cam
with a cam
with pin and slot
with toothed gearing
with pinion and rack
without stable intermediate position, e.g. with snap action
comprising a movable discharge-nozzle
Handles
Pedals or like operating members, e.g. actuated by knee or hip

title.ko: 온도변화에 응답하는 것(초과온도에 의한 것 F16K 17/38; 소방설비의 제어 A62C 37/00; 동결에 의한 관의 파열방지 장치 E03B 7/10)
title.en: responsive to temperature variation (dependant on excessive temperature F16K0017380000;control of fire-fighting equipment A62C0037000000;devices for preventing bursting of water pipes by freezing E03B0007100000)
electrically or magnetically actuated, e.g. by magnets with variable magnetic characteristics
actuated by fluid pressure or volumetric variation in a confined chamber
mechanically actuated, e.g. by a bimetallic strip
Operating means or releasing devices specifically adapted to enhance the speed of valve response
Floats for actuation of valves or other apparatus

title.ko: 사고 또는 잘못된 동작을 방지하는 수단
title.en: Means to prevent accidental or unauthorised actuation
to be locked or disconnected by means of a push or pull
yieldingly resisting the actuation

title.ko: 떼어낼 수 있는 작동부재 또는 록부재를 사용하는 것, 예. 열쇠(F16K 35/10, F16K 35/12가 우선)
title.en: using a removable actuating or locking member, e.g. a key (F16K0035100000, F16K0035120000 take precedence)
requiring setting according to a code, e.g. permutation locks
with locking caps or locking bars
with sealing wire
interlocking two or more valves
with locking member actuated by magnet
Special means in or on valves or other cut-off apparatus for indicating or recording operation thereof, or for enabling an alarm to be given
Devices for relieving the pressure on the sealing faces
for lift valves
for sliding valves
for taps or cocks
Spindle sealings
with stuffing-box
with at least one ring of rubber or like material between spindle and housing
with at least one ring attached to both spindle and housing
with at least one ring provided with axially-protruding peripheral closing-lip
with diaphragm, e.g. shaped as bellows or tube
with approximately flat diaphragm
with conical flange on the spindle which co-operates with a conical surface in the housing
with a flange on the spindle which rests on a sealing ring
sealing only when the closure member is in the opened position

Auxiliary closure means in valves, which in case of repair, e.g. rewashering, of the valve, can take over the function of the normal closure means; Devices for temporary replacement of parts of valves for the same purpose

title.ko: 유체 에너지를 흡수하기 위한 밸브내의 수단(관용 F16L 55/00 )
title.en: Means in valves for absorbing fluid energy (for pipes F16L0055000000)
for preventing water-hammer or noise
for decreasing pressure, the throttle being incorporated in the closure member
with a throttle in the form of a helical channel
for decreasing pressure and having a throttling member separate from the closure member
in which the medium in one direction must flow through the throttling channel, and in the other direction may flow through a much wider channel parallel to the throttling channel
the throttling channel being of helical form
the throttling member being a perforated membrane
the throttling member being a cone

title.ko: 가열 또는 냉각을 위한 밸브 속 또는 위에 부착하는 수단(관용 F16L 53/00; 관 또는 배관계에 연결된 단열 F16L 59/16)
title.en: Means in or on valves for heating or cooling (for pipes F16L0053000000;thermal insulation in connection with pipes or pipe systems F16L0059160000)
Other details not peculiar to particular types of valves or cut-off apparatus
specially adapted for high-vacuum installations
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
